sub_goals.description: Implement UIRender.render(state, rootEl) idempotent DOM repaint, with stable IDs (btn-deal, btn-hit, btn-stand, btn-double, btn-split, btn-reset, input-bet, display-balance, display-message, area-dealer, area-player, blackjack-app). No event binding. Cards rendered with rank+suit, facedown class for hole card, multi-hand support.
Implement styles.css with felt-green table, white card faces, red/black suits, facedown style, dealer/player zones, action button row, disabled button styling, basic responsive layout.
